label: Xenotype icon
description: Defines an icon available for custom xenotypes and xenogerms.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Content-relative path to the icon texture. The game loads this path directly and reports a config error when it is empty. Not translated - use the raw asset path.

basic-xenotype-icon.label: Basic xenotype icon
basic-xenotype-icon.description: A custom xenotype icon with a def name and texture path.
